notes_zh:
- **修复** 修复快捷窗口方向键导航导致的崩溃闪退
- **修复** 切换语言后快捷窗口标签未更新
- **修复** 加载更多数据后选中项跳回顶部
- **优化** 快捷窗口性能优化（分组缓存、批量查询）
- **优化** 重新打开快捷窗口时智能保持/重置状态
- **优化** 切换分类后滚动条自动回到顶部
- **新增** 切换语言后提示重启应用
- **新增** 主窗口拖拽排序类型后快捷窗口同步更新
notes_en:
- **Fix** Fix crash when navigating with arrow keys in Quick Panel
- **Fix** Tab labels not updating after language switch
- **Fix** Selection jumping to top after loading more items
- **Improve** Quick Panel performance (cached grouping, batch queries)
- **Improve** Smart state preservation when reopening Quick Panel
- **Improve** Auto scroll to top when switching content type filter
- **New** Prompt to restart app after language change
- **New** Sync type order between main window and Quick Panel
